race.comment: Local galloper SLIPPERY FISH (3) was in the market here on debut last spring and after stalking the price cruised away and was immediately off the mark. Hasn't raced since but has upside and sure to be primed to pick up where she left off. WRITTEN SIN (4) was ridden in the lead and safely held two back in a hot form race. Ridden cold last time but wound up strongly and scored the matinee win. Skips a grade but has ability and can measure up again. COULDABEENAHANDBAG (2) has been freshened since a near miss in this class at Esperance. Rates highly and expected to go well again. CHIPILLY (7) is resuming and hasn't raced since placing here in this class latest. Placed 3/6 here and looks a top hope if back in good order. JUST SUBLIME (5) has placed 2/2 fresh and among the hopes.
